design_philosophy.core_concept: Digital Village Square - Authentic, Warm, Trustworthy

usage_rules: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Section Headings and Farmer Names to evoke storytelling.
Use 'Nunito' for all UI elements, product descriptions, and dashboard data.
Use 'Caveat' for decorative elements like 'Authentic', '100% Organic' badges or testimonial signatures.

primary.description: Terracotta - Used for Primary CTAs (Buy, Add to Cart)

secondary.description: Sage Green - Used for Trust signals, 'Certified Organic' badges, Success states

background.description: Warm Sand - Main background color. Avoid pure white #FFFFFF for main bg.

text.description: Deep Charcoal - High contrast against Warm Sand.

accent.description: Mustard/Earth - Used for highlights, stars, warnings.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#D0694E] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#81B29A] text-white hover:bg-[#6F9E88] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E07A5F] text-[#E07A5F] hover:bg-[#E07A5F] hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium bg-transparent transition-colors

cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-[#EBE9D7] hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
cards.story: bg-[#F4F1DE] rounded-xl p-6 border-l-4 border-[#E07A5F] italic font-serif text-[#3D405B]

inputs.default: bg-white border-[#81B29A]/30 focus:border-[#E07A5F] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 placeholder:text-[#8D91A8]
inputs.search: rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm border-none pl-12 pr-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]/20

grid_system.products: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8
grid_system.bento_profile: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 md:grid-rows-2 gap-4 h-auto md:h-[600px]

spacing.section_padding: py-16 md:py-24 px-4 md:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto

textures.paper: Use subtle paper texture overlay on Story sections

farmers.description: Authentic portraits of Indian farmers in fields, looking at camera or working.

products.description: High quality shots of spices, vegetables, grains in natural containers (baskets, clay pots).

village_vibes.description: Atmospheric shots of village life, mud houses, landscapes.

libraries.icons: lucide-react (Use standard set: Leaf, Sprout, Tractor, ShoppingBasket, Heart, User, Menu)
libraries.animations: framer-motion (Use for page transitions and scroll reveals)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. **Mobile-First is LAW**: Start every component with mobile styles (base classes) then add `md:` and `lg:` overrides. The village users will primarily use phones.
2. **The 'Story' is the Product**: When designing the Product Detail Page, the 'Meet the Farmer' section is as important as the 'Add to Cart' button. It shouldn't be hidden in a tab.
3. **No 'Tech' Gradients**: Avoid blue/purple tech gradients. Use the defined Earthy gradients.
4. **Authentication**: Use a simple, phone-number-centric design pattern if possible (or email with clear labels).
5. **Images**: Use the provided image URLs for specific categories. Do not use placeholders.
6. **Accessibility**: Ensure text on the 'Warm Sand' background has high contrast (use the 'Deep Charcoal' text color).
7. **Navigation**: Use a Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile users (Home, Search, Cart, Profile) instead of a top hamburger menu for core actions.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
